calendar.matters:
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar May-25-2010 Off Calendar

ARBITRATION ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Mar-16-2010 Set For Case Management Conference On Jun-11-10 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 212

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Compel Responses To Interrogatories Without Objection,Set Number One And For Sanctions Against Deft Joseph Felix;
Off Calendar Feb-25-2010 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
No appearances, tentative ruling is adopted. PLAINTIFF 21ST CENTURY INSURANCE COMPANY'S Motion to Compel Responses To Interrogatories Without Objection is granted. No opposition has been filed. Defendant's failure to respond was a misuse of the discovery process. Defendant is ordered to respond within 15 days of notice of this order. Sanctions are awarded against Defendant in the amount of $340, to be paid within 30 days of notice of this order. Prevailing party to submit form of order. Commissioner Everett A. Hewlett. Not reported.

Notice Of Motion To Have Facts Deemed Admitted
Off Calendar Feb-25-2010 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
No appearances, tentative ruling is adopted. PLAINTIFF 21ST CENTURY INSURANCE COMPANY'S Motion to Compel Production Of Documents And Material For Inspection And Copying Without Objection is granted. No opposition has been filed. Defendant's failure to respond was a misuse of the discovery process. Defendant is ordered to respond within 15 days of notice of this order. Sanctions are awarded against Defendant in the amount of $340, to be paid within 30 days of notice of this order. Prevailing party to submit form of order. Commissioner Everett A. Hewlett. Not reported.
